---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem in the blueprint, docs, or workflow
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the problem briefly.

## Location

Which file, template, doc, or workflow step is affected?

## Expected behavior

What should happen instead?

## Current behavior

What is happening now?

## Reproduction or context

Include steps, links, or examples if relevant.

## Suggested fix (optional)

If you already know what should change, describe it here.
